# platformNotSupported

**Type Property**

The server is unable to provide a token because of an unsupported operating system.

## Declaration

```swift
static var platformNotSupported: AAAttributionError.Code { get }
```

## Error codes

- **internalError**: The server is unable to provide a token because of an internal error.
- **networkError**: The server is unable to provide a token because the internet isn’t available.
- **AAAttributionError.Code**: The error code that the parent class issues.
